accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the SSA administers the title II disability insurance demonstration authority.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; identifying SSA and title II is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes disability insurance demonstration project authority.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Identifies amendments to title II of the Social Security Act (section 234) and the provisions changed.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the limitation that total income may not be reduced and the evaluation metrics notice condition.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the January 1, 2027 effective date and the extended deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all operative provisions: date extensions, waiver authority, notice changes, expenditure rules, income limitation, technical amendments.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriately detailed.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names SSA, the Commissioner, title II, and the two trust funds.

correct_figures.why: All dates and the 90-to-120-day change accurately stated.
